note:
140 HOT setups today? You gotta be kidding me. That’s 40% of our universe on fire! Let me be clear: **this is not what markets look like when risk is off. Full stop.** I don’t care if the bears are screaming recession, credit crunch, or whatever they pulled out of their hat this week. The market pulse is clear, and it’s pounding. The question is: are you paying attention?

Let’s zoom out. Breadth is expanding across sectors, from financials to industrials, and it’s not subtle. When $KRE pops a 98.3 daily score alongside $JPM and $BAC, all in bullish regimes, the message is loud and clear—regional banks and financials are alive and kicking. Remember a year ago when the death knell was ringing for banking? Yeah, seems like the market forgot. That’s leadership. And don’t sleep on industrials here: $XLI and $XLB, both knocking on the door of triple-digit readings, are telling us money is rotating into cyclical areas. The economy may be downshifting, but Wall Street is front-running the rebuild.

But not all squeezes are created equal. Let’s talk themes. Uranium continues to build a floor under its next leg higher, with $UEC (97.2/94.1) and $UUUU (92.85, bullish) both showing real signs of life. Energy is sneaky strong, folks. Then you’ve got $BP (97.4 daily) coming out of its own quiet cycle. Is this the start of the next energy push? Even $UNG (97.4/88.3) is waking up. Don't overthink this—energy isn't dead yet.

And let’s not ignore the rare earth/metals story. $UAMY and $MP are set up to run with squeezes in the 91-89 range and bullish regimes. These are niche names with outsized potential. This is the rotation those miners have been begging for—finally.

Now, let’s talk portfolio. $CIFR is still the juggernaut. We’ve already bagged a double, but it’s holding a hot 93.4 squeeze and remains in a bullish regime. This is rare. If you’re looking to double down, consider this your cheat code. Same with $UAMY. It’s cooled a touch, but it’s still sitting in a HOT squeeze above 90. It’s been flagging right under resistance, and you know how this one ends when it breaks out.

Today, keep an eye on the financial space. $KRE, $JPM, $BAC—they’re not just hot, they’re scorching. Also, uranium’s bubbling—$UEC and $CCJ are interesting if you’re feeling the nuclear love. Lastly, don’t sleep on $XLB and $XLI. A broad industrial rotation could bring the next batch of winners. The market is telling us something here. Are we listening?
